skills.description: Clarify requirements before implementing. Use when serious doubts arise.
anti_triggers: quick discovery read can answer missing details

skills.description: A skill for creating comprehensive implementation plans before writing code, ensuring each step is bite-sized and follows best practices like TDD.
trigger_conditions: When you have a spec or requirements for a multi-step task
anti_triggers: When the engineer has existing context about the codebase and problem domain
